title: Ollama AI node connection refused
symptom: When trying to connect to the Ollama AI node, n8n throws an 'ECONNREFUSED' error. This indicates that the connection to the specified URL is being rejected.
not_this_if: Ollama service is running and accessible
root_cause: The ECONNREFUSED error occurs when the specified service (Ollama) is not reachable at the given address and port. This can happen if the service is not running, the port is incorrect, or there are firewall rules blocking the connection.
fix_steps: Ensure the Ollama service is running on your local machine
Verify the URL and port (http://localhost:11434) are correct
Check firewall settings to ensure the port is open
agent_instruction: Verify that the Ollama service is running and accessible at the specified URL.
